positions.label: City centre; Paulus captured in its sector

positions.label: On the Volga at Rynok since 23 Aug (front keyframe lacks the corridor)

sources.citation: Glantz, D. & House, J. — Stalingrad trilogy (To the Gates of Stalingrad; Armageddon in Stalingrad; Endgame at Stalingrad), 2009–2014

de-h-pz-div-16.notes: Reached the Volga at Rynok on 23 Aug 1942 — deliberately kept at its documented spot so the unit-vs-front worklist flags the missing corridor salient in the front keyframes. Reformed Mar 1943 — separate incarnation, not yet authored. Pilot: corps assignment held constant over the pilot window; positions derived from the corps sector (approximate).
